migrationNotes: This is the first public v0.1.0 release, so no prior stable migration path applies.
Pre-release PBPK wrappers that nested requests under `toolCall.arguments.bundle` are superseded by the published v0.1.0 top-level request payload.
knownLimitations: This is a deterministic-first v0.1.0 server; no probabilistic population engine is shipped.
The module does not execute PBPK, estimate internal dose, derive BER or PoD values, or make final risk decisions.
Remote `streamable-http` deployment requires external authentication and origin controls.
Some screening factors still resolve from heuristic defaults packs and should be treated as flagged screening-level assumptions until curated replacements are added.
PBPK request alignment should be re-validated whenever PBPK MCP changes its published contract version or request model.
